summary: Comprehensive testing completed for crypto data API with full historical data loading. Backend APIs return 2500+ candles for BTC (from 2019), full ETH history, and SOL data (from 2021). Frontend displays complete historical charts correctly.

design_issues.issue: WebSocket connection failures (403 errors) but not affecting core functionality

passed_tests: TA data structure validation - pattern, levels, structure, setup fields present
GET /api/ta/debug endpoint - Returns summary with candles count
Historical chart displays full data range (2019-2026)
Debug panel shows 2500 candles for daily timeframe
Pattern analysis working - shows Ascending Channel with confidence
Technical indicators and levels displayed correctly
Layer visibility controls (Patterns, Levels, Structure, Targets) working
